creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
WordPress 3.3.1 is now available. This maintenance release fixes
15 issues with WordPress 3.3, as well as a fix for a cross-site
scripting vulnerability that affected version 3.3. Thanks to
Joshua H., Hoang T., Stefan Zimmerman, Chris K. and the Go Daddy
security team for responsibly disclosing the bug to our security
team.
